channel.title: Course-end Assessment on Basics of Data Management
channel.description: Recent content in Course-end Assessment on Basics of Data Management

item.title: Data Management Course End Assessment
item.description:
1. Which formula correctly calculates the total of all values in cells B2 through B10? a. =TOTAL(B2:B10) X. =SUM(B2:B10) c. =ADD(B2:B10) d. =SUM(B2-B10)

  2. What does the COUNT function in Excel do? X. Counts the number of cells that contain numbers in a specified range b. Adds all numerical values in a range and returns the total c. Returns the largest value found in a range of cells d. Calculates the arithmetic mean of values in a range
